creator: him@richardkiss.com
text:
Looks good... go ahead and apply it. Thanks.

On Mon, 5 Mar 2007 01:30:25 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of lang/lua50,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109892 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109892
